title: leucas nyassae var. velutina
intro: Leucas nyassae var. velutina, also known as Velvet Leucas, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in African medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections, due to its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving congestion, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Velvet Leucas is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
